name: P0_spot_anchor
source: Silicon Data H100 marketplace median 2024 H2

name: eta_life_M
source: supply-free performance-per-watt frontier clock (NVIDIA H100/B200 datasheets; Epoch AI 2024)

name: eta_life_C
source: performance-per-watt clock damped toward resale floor

name: eta_life_O
source: used-hardware resale residual (decelerating to salvage floor)

name: Tbar_M_to_C
source: roadmap-anchored M->C transition (30 months)

name: sigma_M_to_C
source: transition jitter (6 months)

name: Tbar_C_to_O
source: roadmap-anchored C->O transition

name: sigma_C_to_O
source: transition jitter

name: H_C
source: accrued mid-life drift eta_M * Tbar_MC

name: H_O
source: cumulative descent to the salvage floor (paper eq. D-def)

name: V_prepaid_face
source: contract purchase price (reference spot at inception)

name: L_op
source: operational leg on the AWS EC2 SLA credit schedule

name: sigma_P
source: realized weekly rental log-volatility (weekly to avoid zero-inflation of stale daily prints)

name: tenor
source: Q4-2024 -> Q4-2026 worked delivery

name: G_commodity_24mo
source: commodity branch G^g at 24 months (clock_curve.py gate)

name: F_CoreWeave_24mo
source: credit-adjusted base case (cohort_pipeline.py V0 gate row)

name: c_g_expected_scale
source: grade-level expected-erosion scale (pure-play ceiling beta = c_g * omega)

name: c_prime_g_surprise
source: surprise-erosion scale (calibrate_gamma.py; 0.148 +/- 0.021)

name: kappa_supply
source: supply-factor mean reversion (paper App. A)

name: persistence_1y
source: B.2 effective 1-year persistence of rental shocks

name: R_a_assume
source: executory assumption recovery on delivered value (Section 365 refinement)
